results.rendered_html:
avadhūta p. p.
1 Shaken, waved.
2 Discarded, rejected, despised;  R. 19. 43. 
3 Insulted, humiliated.
4 Excelled, surpassed;  Ratn. 2. 8. 
5 Attacked, overcome.
6 Separated from worldly attachments.
— taḥ An ascetic who has renounced all worldly attachments and connections; yo vilaṃghyāśramānvarṇānātmanyeva sthitaḥ pumān . ativarṇāśramī yogī avadhūtaḥ sa ucyate .. or akṣaratvāt vareṇyatvāt dhūtasaṃsārabaṃdhanāt . tattvamasyarthasiddhatvādavadhūto'bhidhīyate ...
Comp.
— veśa a. undressed, naked.
